summary:
URGENCY OF ETERNITY AND JUDGMENT: Brandon warns that the current time marks the final days before Jesus returns, emphasizing the critical necessity of choosing salvation immediately. Brandon states that eternity is infinite and incomprehensible, contrasting it with the brevity of life. Brandon asserts that after death, individuals face judgment leading either to heaven or hell, emphasizing that Jesus is the exclusive path to salvation while rejecting other deities and the idea of delaying repentance.

DIVINE WARNINGS AND THE COMING SHAKING: Brandon recounts a message from the Lord describing the COVID-19 pandemic as a storm intended to awaken humanity rather than something to be easily prayed away. Brandon conveys that because billions remain spiritually asleep, a greater shaking and a larger wave are coming specifically for the church to force an awakening among lukewarm believers.

PROPHETIC SIGNS AND A FOUR-YEAR REPRIEVE: Brandon references Jonathan Cahn's observation of lightning striking four major American landmarks—the One World Trade Center, the Empire State Building, the Capitol, and the Washington Monument—as a deliberate sign preceding 2025. Brandon explains that the Lord revealed a four-year window of reprieve from the Antichrist agenda, tied to Donald Trump's presidency and four oak trees, to allow for a massive harvest of souls before the seven-year Tribulation.

ECONOMIC FORECASTS AND THE YEAR 2025: Brandon predicts that 2025 will be characterized by war, while a previously delayed great economic crisis finally unfolds. Despite this impending crisis, Brandon foresees a period of great financial provision and supernatural overflow for believers who are spiritually prepared, cautioning that material wealth must not become an idol and that true joy and peace come only from Jesus.

SUPERNATURAL PROVISION AND NATIONAL REVIVAL: Brandon shares a historical account of Maria Woodworth-Etter experiencing supernatural provision during the Great Depression to illustrate how modern believers will also live supernaturally in the days ahead. Furthermore, Brandon foresees a mass migration of people fleeing the East and West Coasts to the central United States, where a major, Woodstock-style revival will occur.

TARGETED PRAYERS FOR LEADERS AND THE NATION: Brandon offers specific prayers for Donald Trump's protection during trials, binding demonic attacks, and calling for a holy conviction upon prosecutors. Brandon also calls upon angels to supernaturally extinguish ongoing fires in California, prays for the revelation of hidden things, and requests a global spiritual revival across America, Asia, the Middle East, and Russia.

PRAYERS FOR HEALING AND HEALTH: Brandon conducts specific prayers for physical healing, focusing heavily on women's wombs for healthy pregnancies and babies born without neurological difficulties or complications. Brandon also explicitly rebukes autoimmune diseases, thyroid disorders, and Seasonal Affective Disorder, declaring physical and mental wholeness for the listeners.
rawData: [January 10, 2025]-[You're running out of time]-[https://youtu.be/k8PbR5HmoG8]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord! It's Brandon and Diana again. We have some things on our heart today, folks. We're in the last of the last days here. Jesus is coming, things are getting serious, and people say, 'Brandon, that kind of scares me.' You should be scared if you don't know Jesus. You should be flat terrified if you don't have Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior. It should just plum freak you out if you don't have Jesus as your Lord and personal savior because you are in trouble. This is the time right now, as we speak, to yield yourself and say, 'Jesus, I need a savior.' You have the opportunity today to make Jesus Christ your Lord and personal savior; to say today, 'I choose to follow Jesus.' No one is promised tomorrow. Have you driven by a massive graveyard and seen all those people? I always wonder how many of those people went to hell and how many went to heaven. Everybody has a choice, but everybody thinks they have a long time to make a choice, and some of you only have today. Some of you will not make it out of your sleep tonight; some of you won't make it out of your week. You are not promised tomorrow; you're only promised right now. I believe with all my heart that God is going to give us long life, and He said He'd satisfy us and show us His salvation. I believe for 120 years. You believe for all this stuff, but sometimes things happen. I'm just trying to make you think about eternity today. Think about eternity. If you look at all the stars in space, if you look at all the grains of sand on the beach, and every single one of those little pieces of grain of sand represent a year—you can count all the sand on a beach, you can count all the stars in the galaxies and the universe, and you still will be counting and counting. Eternity is forever, and so that's what I'm trying to tell you all. If you really look at how big eternity is, your mind can't comprehend it. You can never count all the sand on a beach or the stars in the sky. Even if you did, eternity is far greater than that. So I want you to focus on your eternity. Where will you spend eternity? You don't turn into some kind of nothingness. We don't have reincarnation and come back as a butterfly or a dog or a cat. No, the Bible says it's appointed unto man once to die, and after that the judgment. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord or to be present in hell, folks. Where will you go and spend eternity? That's what you have to ask yourself as you watch this today. Yes, all this stuff is going on, and I'm telling you tragic things I've seen—very sobering, dark days ahead. Most people say, 'Well, that's not for me.' A lot of people in the Christian community do not want to hear it because they think we're going to pray it all away. Folks, things happen, and I want to tell you COVID wasn't prayed away like you all thought it would be. I saw a storm coming and the Lord told me this was a storm to wake up everybody. Did He create the storm? Did He create COVID? No. But the Lord told me, 'I've yelled and yelled to tell my bride to wake up, to tell my body to wake up.' He said, 'Brandon, what happens to a child if you keep telling them to get up? What's the next thing you do?' He said, 'You shake them.' A great shaking to awaken is about to take place. And He told me this: 'If the church does not wake up after this shaking, there will be another shaking. A greater wave, a greater shaking is coming for the church.' We saw a lot of people wake up during this timeframe, but there are still billions that are asleep, that do not see how close we are to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. They rouse themselves and then just fall back asleep. They look up and go, 'Oh, okay,' and they go back to sleep. That's what happened. So now I really believe, whenever Jonathan Cahn talked about the lightning strikes, I thought that was amazing. I encourage you to go watch that video, Jonathan Cahn's lightning strike. He talked about how lightning struck the One World Trade Center, the Empire State Building, the Capitol, and the Washington Monument, and he said this was not coincidence. It all happened before the new year of 2025. It's a sign. I thought it was interesting it was four again. The Lord told me, 'I'm giving you a four-year window for a massive harvest. I'm giving you a reprieve from what was coming, a major reprieve from a great acceleration of the Antichrist agenda upon this earth.' I told you we were at the end of the last Shemitah cycle timeframe of this last Rosh Hashanah. And He told me, 'Adam's lease is up.' But He's giving us a sliver of time to bring in the harvest. Satan is petitioning for the seven-year Tribulation, saying time is up. That's where we are, folks, and God's giving us this little window. I believe through Trump's presidency of these four years, the four lightning strikes, the four oak trees I've told you about—the Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm kicking this down the road. I'm giving you a window. I want a harvest.' Jesus held out His hands with those massive holes and said, 'I am the Lord of the harvest. Will you help me? For I died for every single one of them.' He wants every single one of you to have the opportunity to choose heaven today. You're here because you want to know about terrorist attacks; I'm telling you something much worse is coming than you could ever imagine: it's called hell. You have the opportunity today to choose heaven. God didn't create hell for human beings; He created it for the devil and his demons. He created heaven for you, but it's a choice. Whom will you serve this day? As for me and my house, we're serving the Lord. Jesus Christ is the only way to heaven. Not Buddha, not Muhammad, not any kind of false god. I got an email from a guy saying there's a lot of ways to heaven. No, sir, you are deceived by a demonic spirit. The only way is the Lord Jesus Christ. We believe on this channel that He's coming soon. I had a guy email saying he wants to party in his 20s and give his heart to Jesus in ten years. Is that a serious question? God's not good enough for you right now? That's the attitude of a lot of people, and I say, 'Woe to you,' because there will be a day you stand before the Father and give an account for everything you've done. He will either know you or say, 'Depart from me, I never knew you.' It's a bad eternity for you. I've seen a great economic crisis beyond comprehension. The Lord said it was delayed for a window. There's a word for my body, for the people who are on fire and filled with the Holy Spirit, to have their lamps full of oil. And for the ones living lukewarm, there's a separate word: there will be a great shaking to awaken again for them. He's a God of mercy, giving one last chance to get on the boat. The ark is about to be sealed shut. You're running out of time. Checking your heart: who is your Lord? We have a window here. In 2025, a great shaking is coming. I've heard some people say it would be a year of war, and that's exactly what I heard: war, war, war. And we will see great financial provision. What makes you stand out and show that God is a good God if you're broke, busted, and disgusted, sick, and always depressed? The world is attracted to life. That's why they fake it so much in Hollywood with Botox and fillers and face lifts; they're trying to cover up who they truly are. But when you have a light on your face and a song in your heart, people see it. They feel the presence of the Holy Spirit on you. Material things are never going to fill that empty void in your heart. You yield yourself to the Prince of Peace. He's the one who's going to renew your mind from all the hell you've let in. Garbage in, garbage out; peace in, peace out. Think on things that are pure and holy. People continue to do the same thing expecting different results; that is the definition of insanity. You think you're going to fill this hole with money and perversion? You're still going to be empty tomorrow. You get wasted at bars and then vomit your guts out. The only one that's ever going to satisfy is the Lord Jesus Christ. I am addicted to Jesus. I am sold out. He's changed me from the inside out. I have found the source! He is life, joy, and peace. As you seek His face, He said, 'Give, and it shall be given unto you.' The wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. Seek first the kingdom. He said, 'Brandon, I'll let you have as much overflow as long as it doesn't have you.' I will make you a distribution center if you just yield to me. All I need is peace and joy. A vessel leaks, and you've got to keep being filled with the Holy Spirit. You've got to fill it up with the water of the Word, having fellowship with Him. I know there's a lot of you desperate for change in 2025. You have to raise your praise level. When praises go up, blessings come down. Keep it vertical with the Lord. If you're not in sync with Him on what to do with your money, you'll lose it in a 24-hour period. Are you all in for Jesus today? Perfect love casts out all fear. God is our protector. We were listening to Pastor Chip tonight about Maria Woodworth-Etter in the 1930s during the Great Depression. They had no food, but they set their plates and prayed by faith, and somebody would knock on their door supernaturally. We will live in the supernatural in the days ahead. I saw a window of opportunity to get your house in order. People are going to flee from the East Coast and West Coast to the central part of America for a major revival. I saw Woodstock taking place all over the nation. It's a time to get your heart right. I want to give everyone an opportunity to accept Jesus. We're going to say the sinner's prayer. Romans 10:9-10 says if you confess with your mouth and believe in your heart, you will be saved. Say, 'Jesus, I want to make you my Lord and personal savior. I believe You died and rose again. Forgive me of my sins. Today I'm turning my back on the world and looking to You. Thank You for washing my sins away.' If you said that, you're born again. Find a Bible-believing church, get water baptized, and tell people. It will help you get strong to stand against the devil. It's time to put on your armor. Feed your faith on the Word. Now we're going to pray for President Trump, the inauguration, and the fires in California. We take communion. Lord, we thank You that by Your stripes we are healed. We plead the blood of Jesus over our finances, jobs, and homes. We lift up President Trump and bind the demonic attack concerning this trial. We say, 'Satan, get your hands off.' No weapon formed against him shall prosper. We pray the angels protect him and his family. We call for a holy conviction over these prosecutors. We pray over the fires in California and say, 'Fires, stop now.' We call the angels to put them out. We pray for protection against any kind of attacks on this nation. Let everything hidden be revealed. We call for revival over this beautiful nation, Asia, the Middle East, and Russia. We thank You for the financial outpouring to support the gospel. Diana, pray over the babies. Father, we speak to these women's wombs. We thank You that everything is functioning as it should. We call for healthy pregnancies and easy deliveries. These babies will come forth healed and whole, with no neurological difficulties. We pray they have perfect Apgar scores. We pray for godly homes and strong marriages. We pray against SAD, Seasonal Affective Disorder. We have the mind of Christ. We rebuke autoimmune and thyroid disorders. Today, something good is happening for me! We thank You for the blood of Jesus. Lord, we give You praise. Amen. If you're new here, please subscribe. It helps the algorithm spread the gospel. It's all about getting Jesus spread throughout the whole world. Our new Spanish channel, Last Days Español, is going. We have channels in Chinese, Korean, Vietnamese, and Russian. We're spreading the word because we're running out of time. Thank you for supporting us. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. God bless you.]
